requirement_topic.en: ARSE Licensing and CEET / CEB Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Donor / Lender Technical Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: ARSE许可及CEET / CEB BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及捐助方/贷款方技术规格
requirement_topic.zht: ARSE許可及CEET / CEB BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及捐助方/貸款方技術規格

summary.en: Togo's energy sector is regulated by ARSE (Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Énergie), established under the 2000 Electricity Code (Loi No. 2000-012 portant Code de l'Électricité) and its subsequent amendments. All electricity generation and storage projects above the small-scale threshold require an ARSE concession or authorisation before construction or connection. The distribution and supply utility is CEET (Compagnie Énergie Électrique du Togo), and high-voltage transmission in the Togo-Benin shared system is managed by CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin). Togo's grid operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz (low voltage: 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase; medium voltage: 15/33 kV; high voltage: 161 kV via CEB). Grid-connected BESS — particularly utility-scale storage paired with solar (e.g., Blitta Solar Park, Kara and Dapaong rural extensions under the CIZO programme) — require connection agreements with CEET or CEB specifying protection relay settings, reactive power capability, and SCADA/communication interface. In practice, most large BESS projects in Togo are donor- or development-finance-funded (World Bank, AfDB, EU, ECOWAS-REREC), and their technical specifications — which typically mandate IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 compliance — operate as additional gates alongside ARSE and CEET/CEB requirements. No publicly accessible standalone CEET or CEB technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection terms must be obtained directly from CEET or CEB.
summary.zh: 多哥能源行业由ARSE（能源行业监管局）监管，依据2000年《电力法》（Loi No. 2000-012 portant Code de l'Électricité）及其后续修订设立。超过小规模装机容量门槛的所有发电和储能项目，须在建设或并网前取得ARSE特许经营权或授权。配电和供电公用事业公司为CEET（多哥电力公司），多哥-贝宁共用系统的高压输电由CEB（贝宁-多哥电力共同体）管理。多哥电网运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz（低压：单相220 V、三相380 V；中压：15/33 kV；高压：经CEB的161 kV）。并网BESS——尤其是与太阳能配套的公用事业规模储能（如Blitta太阳能电站、CIZO计划下的Kara和Dapaong农村延伸项目）——需与CEET或CEB签订并网协议，明确保护继电器整定值、无功功率能力及SCADA/通信接口。实际上，多哥大多数大型BESS项目由捐助方或开发融资机构资助（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟、西共体-REREC），其技术规格——通常要求遵循IEC 62619和IEC 62933——在ARSE和CEET/CEB要求之外作为额外门槛。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认CEET或CEB专门针对BESS并网公开发布独立技术规格文件；项目专属并网条款须直接向CEET或CEB获取。
summary.zht: 多哥能源行業由ARSE（能源行業監管局）監管，依據2000年《電力法》（Loi No. 2000-012 portant Code de l'Électricité）及其後續修訂設立。超過小規模裝機容量門檻的所有發電和儲能項目，須在建設或併網前取得ARSE特許經營權或授權。配電和供電公用事業公司為CEET（多哥電力公司），多哥-貝寧共用系統的高壓輸電由CEB（貝寧-多哥電力共同體）管理。多哥電網運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz（低壓：單相220 V、三相380 V；中壓：15/33 kV；高壓：經CEB的161 kV）。併網BESS——尤其是與太陽能配套的公用事業規模儲能（如Blitta太陽能電站、CIZO計畫下的Kara和Dapaong農村延伸項目）——需與CEET或CEB簽訂併網協議，明確保護繼電器整定值、無功功率能力及SCADA/通訊接口。實際上，多哥大多數大型BESS項目由捐助方或開發融資機構資助（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟、西共體-REREC），其技術規格——通常要求遵循IEC 62619和IEC 62933——在ARSE和CEET/CEB要求之外作為額外門檻。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認CEET或CEB專門針對BESS併網公開發布獨立技術規格文件；項目專屬併網條款須直接向CEET或CEB獲取。

standards_or_laws: Loi No. 2000-012 portant Code de l'Électricité du Togo — primary electricity sector law establishing ARSE and the licensing framework for generation and storage
ARSE (Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Énergie) — concession or authorisation mandatory for grid-connected BESS above the small-scale threshold
CEET (Compagnie Énergie Électrique du Togo) — distribution-level grid-connection agreement required; technical requirements project-specific
CEB (Communauté Électrique du Bénin) — transmission-level connection for utility-scale BESS; Togo-Benin shared high-voltage grid at 161 kV
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected in donor / lender project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected in donor / lender project specifications)
WAPP (West African Power Pool) — regional grid code and interconnection requirements relevant for CEB-connected BESS

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — the same nominal voltage as Togo — which removes the voltage-level re-parameterisation gap present in Qatar and some other export markets. However, protection relay coordination settings, reactive power (Q/V) droop curves, frequency response parameters, and SCADA communication protocols configured for China's grid must be reviewed and potentially adapted for Togo's CEET/CEB system and any applicable WAPP regional grid-code requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与多哥名义电压相同，消除了在卡塔尔及部分其他出口市场存在的电压等级重新参数配置差距。然而，针对中国电网配置的保护继电器协调整定值、无功功率（Q/V）下垂曲线、频率响应参数和SCADA通信协议，须在接入多哥CEET/CEB系统及任何适用的西非电力池（WAPP）地区电网规范要求前进行审查并可能作出调整。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與多哥名義電壓相同，消除了在卡達及部分其他出口市場存在的電壓等級重新參數配置差距。然而，針對中國電網配置的保護繼電器協調整定值、無功功率（Q/V）下垂曲線、頻率響應參數和SCADA通訊協議，須在接入多哥CEET/CEB系統及任何適用的西非電力池（WAPP）地區電網規範要求前進行審查並可能作出調整。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARSE licensing or CEET/CEB grid-connection requirements. Key gaps requiring attention: (a) ARSE project authorisation — obtain a concession or authorisation from ARSE before construction; the threshold capacity and procedure should be confirmed with ARSE directly as regulatory updates may have occurred since the 2000 Electricity Code; (b) CEET/CEB connection agreement — engage CEET (distribution level) or CEB (transmission level) at the earliest project stage to obtain protection relay settings, reactive power capability requirements, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series evidence — donor-funded and lender-reviewed projects will typically require IEC 62933-2-1 and/or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) WAPP regional grid code compliance — where the BESS is connected at the transmission level or interconnected via CEB into the WAPP network, review WAPP interconnection technical requirements; (e) voltage is nominally aligned (220/380 V, 50 Hz) but protection settings and Q/V response must still be verified against CEET/CEB requirements; (f) climate adaptation — Togo's high ambient temperature (27–35 °C average, peaks above 40 °C in the north) and harmattan dust season require verified thermal management and IP-rating documentation not typically addressed in Chinese domestic grid-connection procedures.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足ARSE许可或CEET/CEB并网要求。需注意的主要差距：（a）ARSE项目授权——在建设前向ARSE取得特许经营权或授权；门槛容量和程序须直接向ARSE确认，因自2000年《电力法》以来法规可能已有更新；（b）CEET/CEB并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前，在项目最早阶段与CEET（配电层）或CEB（输电层）接触，获取保护继电器整定值、无功功率能力要求及SCADA/通信协议规格；（c）IEC 62933系列证据——捐助资助和贷款方审查的项目通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和/或IEC 62933-5-2证据；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）西非电力池（WAPP）地区电网规范合规——若BESS在输电层接入或经CEB联入WAPP网络，须审查WAPP互联技术要求；（e）电压名义上一致（220/380 V、50 Hz），但保护整定和Q/V响应仍须对照CEET/CEB要求核实；（f）气候适应性——多哥高环境温度（平均27–35°C，北部峰值超过40°C）和哈马丹沙尘季节，需要经过验证的热管理和IP防护等级文件，这在中国国内并网程序中通常未涵盖。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足ARSE許可或CEET/CEB併網要求。需注意的主要差距：（a）ARSE項目授權——在建設前向ARSE取得特許經營權或授權；門檻容量和程序須直接向ARSE確認，因自2000年《電力法》以來法規可能已有更新；（b）CEET/CEB併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前，在項目最早階段與CEET（配電層）或CEB（輸電層）接觸，獲取保護繼電器整定值、無功功率能力要求及SCADA/通訊協議規格；（c）IEC 62933系列證據——捐助資助和貸款方審查的項目通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和/或IEC 62933-5-2證據；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）西非電力池（WAPP）地區電網規範合規——若BESS在輸電層接入或經CEB聯入WAPP網路，須審查WAPP互聯技術要求；（e）電壓名義上一致（220/380 V、50 Hz），但保護整定和Q/V響應仍須對照CEET/CEB要求核實；（f）氣候適應性——多哥高環境溫度（平均27–35°C，北部峰值超過40°C）和哈馬丹沙塵季節，需要經過驗證的熱管理和IP防護等級文件，這在中國國內併網程序中通常未涵蓋。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSE authorisation required for grid-connected BESS above the small-scale threshold; CEET or CEB connection agreement required for all grid-connected installations; donor/lender IEC technical requirements are a parallel mandatory gate for most large-scale funded projects
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Togo

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Réglementation du Secteur de l'Énergie, République Togolaise

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARSE licensing or CEET/CEB grid-connection requirements in Togo. Grid voltage is nominally aligned at 220/380 V 50 Hz, but protection relay settings, reactive power parameters, and SCADA communication protocols must be reviewed and adapted for CEET/CEB specifications. Engage ARSE for project authorisation and CEET or CEB for connection agreement terms at the earliest project stage, before equipment design is finalised. For donor- or lender-funded projects, obtain the applicable IEC 62933 evidence required by the funding institution's technical specifications — Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足多哥ARSE许可或CEET/CEB并网要求。电网电压名义上与多哥一致（220/380 V 50 Hz），但保护继电器整定值、无功功率参数和SCADA通信协议须针对CEET/CEB规格进行审查和调整。在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段向ARSE申请项目授权，并与CEET或CEB接触以获取并网协议条款。对于捐助方或贷款方资助的项目，须获取资助机构技术规格要求的适用IEC 62933证据——中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足多哥ARSE許可或CEET/CEB併網要求。電網電壓名義上與多哥一致（220/380 V 50 Hz），但保護繼電器整定值、無功功率參數和SCADA通訊協議須針對CEET/CEB規格進行審查和調整。在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段向ARSE申請項目授權，並與CEET或CEB接觸以獲取併網協議條款。對於捐助方或貸款方資助的項目，須獲取資助機構技術規格要求的適用IEC 62933證據——中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據。
